perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A large blue mascot character with yellow eyes and a wide mouth sits on a grey L-shaped sofa in a modern living room, surrounded by various snack bags. (2) The scene shifts to a gym where a fit male coach in a pink t-shirt greets the mascot. (3) A training montage follows: the mascot attempts cable rows and squats while the coach observes; a red medicine ball is thrown at the mascot, hitting it in the face. (4) The mascot lies on a gym mat as the coach performs aggressive stretching and massage on its soft, pillow-like limbs. (5) The mascot is seen behind a counter filled with branded merchandise including boxes, stickers, and socks. (6) The video ends with a 2D animation of two characters and a cat pushing a shopping cart, followed by a graphic displaying a website URL and social media handles.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, bouncy synth-pop background music begins as a high-pitched, energetic male voice (mascot) speaks continuously. (2) The soundscape transitions as a calm, natural male voice (coach) enters, followed by ambient gym noise including the clinking of weights. (3) During the training sequence, the music becomes more driving with a faster tempo, interspersed with physical sound effects like thuds and heavy breathing. (4) The stretching segment is characterized by series of loud, exaggerated, high-pitched comical screams and 'ouch' sound effects. (5) The final phase features a deeper narrator voice delivering a promotional announcement over a triumphant, jingle-like melody.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional white subtitles appear at the bottom reflecting the spoken dialogue about getting fat and going to the gym. (2) Decorative large white text with black outlines highlights key phrases like '三十歲的叛逆仙子' (The 30-year-old Rebellious Fairy). (3) Functional text in the final animation includes '阿啾小賣店 正式開張!' (Achusan Shop Officially Open!) and 'GRAND OPENING'. (4) A list of social media links and the website 'ACHUSAN.COM' is displayed at the very end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Motivation -> Gym Training -> Comedy Climax -> Shop Promotion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male fitness coach, 1 person wearing a full-body blue mascot suit.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A muscular Asian male fitness coach wearing a pink 'Verve' t-shirt and black pants; and a large blue plush mascot character with distinctive yellow eyes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic living room with a grey sofa and wood-paneled walls; a professional gym with weight machines, treadmills, and exercise mats; a cluttered shop counter with various boxes and branded goods.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and natural window light in the gym.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Challenge -> Humorous Climax -> Promotional Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous narrative about a lazy mascot trying to get fit at a gym to engage the audience, creating a memorable transition into an advertisement for the creator's official merchandise shop (阿啾小賣店).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of products and announcement of a web store opening with a clear URL call-to-action.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Blue mascot character '叛逆仙子' (Rebellious Fairy) and the 'Achusan' branding.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the physical comedy of a soft mascot suit in a hard gym environment to build rapport before the sales pitch.
